motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default state transitions when motion is added.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Post feedback and primary actions on artifact pages.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { padding: 0.55rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #3d6fbf; background: #3d6fbf; color: #ffffff; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4d82d4; border-color: #4d82d4; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6ea8ff; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Field
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 0.65rem 0.8rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #2a3140; background: #0a0e14; color: #e8ecf4; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9aa6bd; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #6ea8ff; outline-offset: 2px; border-color: #3d6fbf; }

components.name: Command Card
components.css: .ds-card { display: grid; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid #2a3140; border-radius: 12px; background: color-mix(in srgb, #14181f 90%, transparent); } .ds-card-code { display: block; padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem; border-radius: 8px; background: #0a0e14; border: 1px solid #2a3140; font-family: "IBM Plex Mono", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #e8ecf4; }

components.name: Artifact Viewer
components.description: Bordered container for rendered artifact content.
components.css: .ds-viewer { border: 1px solid #2a3140; border-radius: 12px; background: color-mix(in srgb, #14181f 92%, transparent); padding: 1.25rem; min-height: 200px; color: #e8ecf4; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-viewer-placeholder { margin: 0; color: #9aa6bd; }

components.name: Feedback Item
components.description: Single comment in the feedback thread.
components.html:
• ReviewerJul 6, 2026

    Looks good — ship it.
components.css: .ds-feedback-item { list-style: none; border: 1px solid #2a3140; border-radius: 10px; padding: 0.9rem 1rem; background: color-mix(in srgb, #14181f 88%, transparent); color: #e8ecf4; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-feedback-author { font-weight: 600; } .ds-feedback-time { display: block; color: #9aa6bd; font-size: 0.85rem; margin: 0.2rem 0 0.5rem; } .ds-feedback-body { margin: 0; white-space: pre-wrap; }

narrative.overview: OpenArtifacts is a developer-facing review surface: the artifact is the work, the UI is the frame. Visual language follows Linear's tight hierarchy and restrained color — fast to parse, never competing with markdown, diagrams, or HTML prototypes.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, cool-neutral canvas with a single blue accent used sparingly
IBM Plex Sans for UI chrome; Plex Mono for code and CLI snippets
Flat surfaces separated by 1px borders and subtle color-mix tints
Uppercase eyebrows only where they label artifact kind or product name

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue accent appears on links, one eyebrow per view, and primary buttons — not on decorative borders, backgrounds, or section dividers.

rules.name: The No Cream Rule
rules.body: Body backgrounds stay cool and dark. Warm sand, parchment, or cream neutrals are out of scope.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Sparingly Rule
rules.body: At most one uppercase tracked label per major header. No section-index eyebrows.

rules.name: The Flat Frame Rule
rules.body: Viewer and feedback panels use border + tint only. Never add a 16px blur shadow alongside a 1px border.

dos: Do keep the artifact viewer the brightest, highest-contrast region on artifact pages.
Do use IBM Plex Mono for CLI examples and code fences.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on any future transitions.
donts: Don't use SaaS landing clichés — hero metrics, gradient text, eyebrow kickers on every section, or identical icon-card grids.
Don't pair border: 1px solid with wide soft drop shadows on the same element.
Don't exceed 12px radius on cards or panels.
Don't add glassmorphism, neon gradients, or purple AI-tool ambient lighting beyond existing subtle radial washes.
Don't use warm cream editorial backgrounds that fight artifact content.
